searchDebt.rationale: Adjusted wording is supplied in this narrative, but the reviewed target is read-only.
searchDebt.reason: Apply the scoped wording in a separate implementation/edit pass.

searchDebt.rationale: The narrative supplies citations and a precise anchor convention without mutating the target.
searchDebt.reason: Transfer the adjusted list and cited questions into the target during follow-up.

searchDebt.reason: The guide must be inserted into the read-only analysis in a separate edit pass.

searchDebt.rationale: Narrow replacement wording is supplied without asserting missing provenance.
searchDebt.reason: Attach a non-report audit citation or adopt the narrower provenance text.

results.summary: All 22 links resolve, but only 2 fully support their linked claim; 8 are partial aggregate anchors and 12 point only to scenario identifiers.
Eight provenance figures reproduce; claim (g) is semantically supported but uses literal null wording for omitted keys, and the verifier identity has no report-verifiable audit anchor.
Not applicable to an analytical findings document.
